completion_summary: Locked 178 dependencies, separated the 193-file backend semantic identity from docs, reproduced 45 profiles and six composed chains through a clean Windows wheel, promoted backend-v0.5-formal-candidate, fixed reference-fixture and concurrent-HEAD release-gate regressions, and passed the final 12/12 HEAD-stable release gate with 1302 tests passed and 14 skipped.
scope: Lock dependencies, compute a docs-independent backend semantic identity, reproduce v0.5 golden runtime through source and clean-wheel processes, and remediate release-gate regressions including concurrent HEAD drift
